penalties.description: Two rings were dropped outside the field of view and were not retrievable.

reasoning: The timing start was clear from the first object touch, and the last object release was observed. Two objects were lost out of view, resulting in penalty deductions. Lighting was adequate, but some occlusion affected confidence.
